name: dnscat2-server
title: dnscat2-server
description:
DNS tunnel, the server part
This tool is designed to create an encrypted command-and-control (C&C) channel
over the DNS protocol, which is an effective tunnel out of almost every
network.
.
The server is designed to be run on an authoritative DNS server.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for dnscat2-server.
arguments.raw: -server  Option present in package usage line for dnscat2-server.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dnscat2-server because DNS tunnel, the server part.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dnscat2-server as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dnscat2-server [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dnscat2-server.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dnscat2-server with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dnscat2-server --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -server
arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for dnscat2-server.
